perturbation.original_text: Subject to any privacy laws, both the Company and the Contractor will be able to use these lists for their own business purposes as long as doing so does not interfere with the marketing, sale or administration of the Notes.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to any privacy laws, the Company will be able to use these lists for their own business purposes as long as doing so does not interfere with the marketing, sale or administration of the Notes. The Contractor may not use the lists of investors without prior written consent of the Company.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by restricting the Contractor's right to use investor lists. The original text allows both the Company and the Contractor to use the lists for their own purposes, subject to privacy laws. The modified text removes this right for the Contractor and states that the Contractor can not use these lists, unless there's prior consent from the company. This contradicts the original agreement, creating uncertainty and potentially restricting the Contractor's ability to conduct their unrelated activities, as defined in Section 2.05.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Rights to Investor Lists. The parties acknowledge that the Offering will produce a list of investors that purchase Notes, a list of prospects that respond to advertisements, but do not purchase any Notes, a list of former investors who redeemed their Notes, and a list of former investors whose Notes the Company redeemed. Subject to any privacy laws, the Company will be able to use these lists for their own business purposes as long as doing so does not interfere with the marketing, sale or administration of the Notes. The Contractor may not use the lists of investors without prior written consent of the Company.
perturbation.justification: The original text allowed both the Company and the Contractor to use investor lists, subject to privacy laws. The changed text restricts the Contractor's right to use these lists, requiring prior written consent from the Company. This directly contradicts the original agreement, creating an in-text contradiction within the document and making the terms regarding the Contractor's use of investor lists inconsistent. This is an 'Inconsistency - In Text Contradiction', as the changed text introduces a new restriction on the Contractor that was not present in the original agreement.
